tasks.dependencies: Fetches the list of Suppliers endpoints/accounts/vendors to map over

tasks.task_type: PythonOperator.expand (dynamic task mapping, exponential backoff retries)
tasks.dependencies: One mapped instance per endpoint; retry policy is error-code-aware
Aggregates success/failure/retry counts across mapped instances
Evaluates aggregate retry/error rate against a storm threshold
Branch: retry rate within normal bounds
Branch: retry storm detected, trips circuit breaker for downstream calls
Pages on-call, attaches AutoRCA retry-storm analysis
Loads Suppliers target with successfully retrieved records

incident.description: Retry Storm incident on the Suppliers pipeline (RTL_SUP_RETRY): suppliers vendor SFTP retry storm.
incident.symptoms: SFTP file-pull tasks across 200 dynamically mapped vendor connections generated a combined 1,400 retries.
incident.root_cause: A shared jump-host used for all vendor SFTP connections hit its max-concurrent-session limit (50) once dynamic task mapping concurrency exceeded that, causing connection-refused errors that each mapped task independently retried without global coordination.
incident.business_impact: Vendor ASN ingestion delayed 4+ hours; the jump host's connection saturation also degraded an unrelated finance SFTP integration sharing the same infrastructure.
incident.resolution: Cap Airflow's max_active_tis_per_dagrun for the mapped task to stay under the jump-host's session limit; add a shared connection-pool-aware throttle.

expected_rca.expected_rca_summary: AI AutoRCA should identify: A shared jump-host used for all vendor SFTP connections hit its max-concurrent-session limit (50) once dynamic task mapping concurrency exceeded that, causing connection-refused errors that each mapped task independently retried without global coordination.
expected_rca.evidence_required: Airflow task logs, Datadog infrastructure/application metrics, JIRA/Confluence RAG context for known-issue matching
expected_rca.airflow_logs: Airflow shows retries clustered simultaneously across many mapped task instances rather than spread over time
expected_rca.datadog_metrics: Datadog jumphost.active_sessions metric hit its ceiling (50) exactly when retries began climbing
expected_rca.resolution: Cap Airflow's max_active_tis_per_dagrun for the mapped task to stay under the jump-host's session limit; add a shared connection-pool-aware throttle.
expected_rca.preventive_action: Add infrastructure-shared-resource constraints (e.g., max concurrent sessions on shared jump hosts) as a first-class metadata field the DAG factory respects when setting concurrency limits.
